en_title: Apple is the Latest Company to Raise Prices Because of AI
cn_title: 苹果全线涨价，AI内存成本作祟
subtitle: 无一幸免
opus_summary: 苹果因内存成本上涨，调高MacBook Neo、Vision Pro等售价，涨幅100-1300美元(约合人民币8853元)(约715-9295元)。

paragraphs.en: Just a week after , Apple has raised prices on most of its products due to increased memory demand.
paragraphs.cn: 仅仅一周之后，苹果因内存需求激增上调了多数产品的售价。

paragraphs.en: Everything from the MacBook Neo to the Apple Vision Pro has gone up in price on Apple's website , by as much as $200 for the latter. The MacBook Neo , which came out earlier this year for $599 as a way for Apple to take over some of the budget market from low-end Windows laptops and Chromebooks, went up by $100. The biggest price increase though, is the top-end Mac Studio with the M3 Ultra, which went up from $3,999 to $5,299 – a $1,300 jump.
paragraphs.cn: 从MacBook Neo到Apple Vision Pro，苹果官网上的产品价格全面上涨，后者的涨幅高达200美元(约合人民币1362元)。今年早些时候以599美元(约合人民币4079元)发售的MacBook Neo，旨在帮助苹果从低端Windows笔记本和Chromebook手中抢占部分预算市场，如今涨价100美元(约合人民币681元)。不过，涨幅最大的还是搭载M3 Ultra的顶级Mac Studio，从3,999美元(约合人民币3万元)涨到了5,299美元(约合人民币4万元)，整整涨了1,300美元(约合人民币8853元)。

paragraphs.en: These price increases aren't exactly surprising. This entire year has been an ongoing saga of price increases for memory , thanks to increased demand from AI companies building data centers. The only surprising thing about Apple's price increases coming now, is that it took as long as it did. After all, Apple has been known for its premium prices for years.
paragraphs.cn: 这些涨价并不令人意外。今年一整年，由于AI公司建设数据中心导致的内存需求增加，内存价格就一直在涨。苹果现在提价唯一令人意外的是，居然拖了这么久。毕竟，苹果多年来一直以高价著称。

paragraphs.en: But at least Apple isn't alone. Even the PS5 and the Xbox Series X saw price increases earlier this year, and we've heard from Xbox CEO Asha Sharma that the company expects memory costs to increase by five times by the end of 2027, which probably means more price increases in the future. And, just this week, the Steam Machine launched at a high $1,049 price point , thanks in large part to the current memory market.
paragraphs.cn: 但至少苹果不是唯一涨价的。就连PS5和XBOX Series在今年早些时候也涨了价，我们还从XBOX CEO Asha Sharma那里得知，该公司预计到2027年底内存成本将增长五倍，这很可能意味着未来还会涨价。而就在本周，Steam Machine以1049美元(约合人民币7144元)的高价发售，这在很大程度上也是拜当前内存市场所赐。

paragraphs.en: The only silver lining here is that the prices haven't quite jumped up on Amazon yet. If you were meaning to get your hands on a new MacBook or a new iPad, now might be the time to do it, before these $100-$300 price jumps hit there too.
paragraphs.cn: 唯一的好消息是，亚马逊上的价格还没同步上涨。如果你想入手新MacBook或新iPad，现在或许正是时候，趁这些100至300美元(约合人民币681至2043元)的涨幅还没蔓延到那里。

paragraphs.en: Jackie Thomas is the Hardware and Buying Guides Editor at IGN and the PC components queen. You can follow her @Jackiecobra
paragraphs.cn: Jackie Thomas是IGN的硬件与购买指南编辑，人称‘PC组件女王’。你可以在 @Jackiecobra关注她。
